reviews.title: doesn't stay on securely
reviews.text: I've purchased one of these in the past and liked it, but the gold color faded so I l reordered another it in black. However, this time, one side kept disconnecting and the attachment site looked defective compared to the other side causing me to almost lose my Fitbit twice. Luckily, I was indoors and heard it drop. I will return it and try a different brand as I fear I will encounter this issue again if I simply replace it.  This style is nice because it's easy to put on and off even with a single hand as opposed to the type of bracelet that comes with the Fitbit.

reviews.title: Worried the magnet will damage device
reviews.text: I wanted a band that would have more variability in fit, and I liked the color, so I ordered this.  It is, indeed, compatible with the Fitbit Sense and I enjoyed it for several days until I had to charge my Sense.  I then discovered that the magnet was so strong that I had difficulty keeping it off the back of my device long enough to get the charger on.  I was worried that strong magnet might damage the circuits and contacted FitBit for their opinion.  They weren't sure, but pointed out that they do have a hook-and-loop wristband in-house that is available.  Since I was also having trouble with the edges of the VNCAS band getting caught on my wool shawl and anything else fuzzy I wore, I decided to ditch it for the FitBit brand option.  Sorry, but I can't recommend this one.

reviews.title: Not Well Made😳
reviews.text: Initially when I bought this watch band, I thought it was nice, solid and seemed to be well made. I've been wearing it just a little over 2 months now and there's some sharp little burrs that have now showed up on the watch band itself and the edges of the other parts are now seeming to be sharp as well and keep getting hung up on my clothing and have also scratched my boyfriend several times. The finish is wearing off on the backside of the magnet connector area so now it looks very tarnished. I do wear it everyday all day long, but I don't feel after such a short period of time it should look so bad and have these sharp edges now. Unfortunately it's past my return window so I'm going to have to just throw it away and get another one. Such a shame because I really like the magnetic band and the color. I'm a little bit leery about buying another similar style for fear that the same thing will happen again. 😳

reviews.title: Cute but it snags
reviews.text: It snags on everything. Ugh. So I can't wear it with nice blouses or sweaters it gets caught and causes holes, runs, etc. Otherwise I love it.

reviews.title: Like the fact that it's magnetic

reviews.title: Superb smart watch! Excellent value! 🙌🏻💰
reviews.text:
This is an excellent watch especially for those who are very concerned about their overall health. I have a lot of health challenges and so it's important for me to be monitoring certain aspects like blood pressure, heart rate, and oxygen saturation. I'm typically someone who has high blood pressure have a pre-existing condition. This determines whether I can donate plasma, if I'm consuming too many calorie rich foods or if I should be concerned for my heart rate.

I love how this watch is very mindful of how long you've been sitting because I'm guilty of spending hours on the couch. Despite my poor health, it still essential to get up every once in a while and move around to get the blood flowing. This watch has excellent battery life I've only had to charge it one time since I've had it and I've had it now for over a month! Even being connected to Bluetooth on your phone it does not drain the battery quickly which is awesome! Pairing was super easy, just download the app pair it and set it and forget it. The watch and my phone always per immediately I've never had to fuss around with anything just great! I would highly recommend this watch to anyone. Certainly keeps me active and gives me all the important information I need to know on a daily basis 🙌🏻👍🏻🫁🏆

title: Apple Watch Series 8 [GPS + Cellular 41mm] Smart Watch w/Graphite Stainless Steel Case w/Midnight Sport Band-S/M. Fitness Tracker, Blood Oxygen & ECG Apps, Always-On Retina Display, Water Resistant
features: WHY APPLE WATCH SERIES 8 — Your essential companion for a healthy life is now even more powerful. Advanced sensors provide insights to help you better understand your health. New safety features can get you help when you need it. The bright, Always-On Retina display is easy to read, even when your wrist is down.

CELLULAR CONNECTIVITY — Send a text, make a call, and stream music without your iPhone, even while traveling internationally. Use Family Setup to manage Apple Watch for family members who don’t have an iPhone.
EASILY CUSTOMIZABLE — Available in a range of sizes and materials, with dozens of bands to choose from and watch faces with complications tailored to whatever you’re into.

INNOVATIVE SAFETY FEATURES — Crash Detection and Fall Detection can automatically connect you with emergency services in the event of a severe car crash or a hard fall. And Emergency SOS provides urgent assistance with the press of a button.

ADVANCED HEALTH FEATURES — Temperature sensing is a breakthrough feature that provides deep insights into women’s health. Keep an eye on your blood oxygen. Take an ECG anytime. Get notifications if you have an irregular rhythm. And see how much time you spent in REM, Core, or Deep sleep with Sleep Stages.

SIMPLY COMPATIBLE — It works seamlessly with your Apple devices and services. Unlock your Mac automatically. Find your devices with a tap. Pay and send money with Apple Pay. Apple Watch requires an iPhone 8 or later with the latest iOS version.
INCREDIBLE DURABILITY — Tougher than tough. It’s crack resistant, IP6X-certified dust resistant, and swimproof with WR50 water resistance.

A POWERFUL FITNESS PARTNER — The enhanced Workout app gives you new ways to train, and advanced metrics for more information about your workout performance. And Apple Watch comes with three months of Apple Fitness+ free.
APPS ON YOUR WRIST — With access to tens of thousands of apps on the App Store right on your wrist, Apple Watch is the perfect personal device for whatever you love to do.
LEGAL DISCLAIMERS — This is a summary of the main product features. See below to learn more.

reviews.title: Nice feel. but easily broken

However after wearing it for a few weeks, when putting it back on after charging, the connection to the latch broke and its not repairable. Its a nice feeling material but this broke way to easily and after only a few weeks of use is rather disappointing.

reviews.title: Angry customer
reviews.text: So after receiving these items on March 29, 2021, it took 5 hrs to charge, the headphone jack doesn't even fit the watch!  On top of that my daughter plays on it for 15 mins and it dies!  She wore it to play on it and the wrist band broke!  I'm not happy at all and will never be buying this brand ever again!  It wouldn't even turn on right away after charging! The headphones are absolutely the worst thing ever ! I plugged them in to my phone and all we heard was high pitched screeching!  I'm not asking for my money back, I'm just warning others to be careful!  Complete false advertising!

reviews.title: Very accurate on counting steps
reviews.text: I'm happy I found this! In my opinion, it is way more accurate than wearing my Fitbit on my wrist. I've gone from thinking I was a snail and not moving most days to a walking whiz! Just keep in mind if you are out in public with pants that don't cover it, folks may look at you. It looks a little like an electronic monitoring bracelet. Which is fun to me. Let them wonder what I've been up to.....

reviews.title: Heart rate not detectable most of the time
reviews.text: It's nice for working out. But it does not track heart rate with a darn. Lights facing in though the mesh tight on the skin and nadda. A big disappointment. Directly on the skin, adjusted all around. Charge 3

reviews.title: Didn't count steps
reviews.text: I used this for a few weeks because I didn't feel my band was counting steps when I was shopping or carrying something.  I was very surprised to see that after a full day out-and-about I had under 300 steps on the counter.  That's roughly what I would normally have when I got up to get my morning coffee.  I tried re-adjusting and tried the other leg, but got the same result.  I'm back to keeping my tracker on my wrist.  Disappointed.

reviews.title: Comfortable and Lightweight
reviews.text: I love this! It is exactly what I need to help me keep moving and to accurately register steps as I work to increase my activity! The band is light and very comfortable. I hardly even notice that I have it on. The band does have some stretch to it which helps in making it easy to put on.

reviews.title: Works great!
reviews.text: This band has helped me continue to get my steps when I am watching and carrying grandchildren, pushing a stroller or grocery cart, doing a lot of carrying around the house...I love it!  It is comfortable and secure!  With four snaps I can't imagine how you could lose it!

title: Vowor 4G Smartwatch for Kids with Sim Card, Waterproof Phone Watch with WiFi LBS GPS Tracker Video Chat SOS Camera Alarm Clock Anti Lost Watches Children Boys Girls Birthday Gift Age 3-15 (Black)
description:
Vowor Smart watches 4G for Kids
Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5
3G Bands (WCDMA):
US: B2/B5
4G Band(FDD TDD):
US:B2/4/5/7/12/17
Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Fun toy "smart watch"

It's loaded with games and nursery songs and functions (including selfie and regular camera), lots of things to keep a little one busy and entertained. The listing says it's suitable for ages 3 - 10, but I suspect a lot of children over, say, age 7 may kind of sneer at it for not being a real smart watch. But younger ones will find a lot of fun things to play with.

reviews.title: Better than my Apple Watch
reviews.text: Got this for the kiddo. He’s 14 and Captain Destructo. This kid literally body slams trees for fun and the best and sturdiest gifts for him last about a week. Two if you’re lucky. We’re never lucky. However, it’s been a while and he wears it nonstop. Get this, it still works. He loves the band and all of the features. The battery life makes my jaw drop. I have to charge my Apple Watch at least once a day. This watch does more and has a battery life that won’t quit. I’d fight him for it but again…he body slams trees. Great purchase, guys. It’s also a smart and inexpensive way to test your kid’s level of responsibility before buying more expensive products and flushing your money.

title: EURANS Smart Watch 42mm Bluetooth Calling (Answer/Make Call) HD Touch Screen IP68 Waterproof Fitness Tracker for Android and iOS Phones, Blood Oxygen & Heart Rate Monitor, Sleep Tracking for Men Women
features: 【𝐁𝐥𝐮𝐞𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡 𝐃𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 & 𝐀𝐧𝐬𝐰𝐞𝐫】 When connecting the watch with your phone with bluetooth, you are able to answer and make calls directly via this smartwatch with its built-in microphone and speaker. 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞: 𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐟𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡 𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐡𝐨𝐧𝐞, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐀𝐏𝐏.

【𝟒𝟐𝐦𝐦 𝟔𝟎 𝐅𝐏𝐒 𝐓𝐨𝐮𝐜𝐡 𝐒𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐧】Features a 42mm (1.7'') coloful touch screen, narrow bezels provide 20% more visible area allow you see more information at a glance and easier touch control on this fitness watch. Enjoy the vivid animation with this 60 FPS screen.

【𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐡 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 & 𝐒𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠】Features blood oxygen & heart rate monitor, this fitness tracker can track your heart rate all day and alert you once your heart rate reach safe threshold. It can track your sleep peroid: Light, Deep and REM sleep stage. If you'd like to know your blood oxygen level, just a press on the watch and it will start to mearsure.

【𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐅𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐅𝐢𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬】Up to 100 sports modes, this watch will meet all your need on exercise! After connected to your phone, it can also record your ourdoor route and display in App. Features weather forecast can let you know how the weathe going and plan your exercise!

【𝐆𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐁𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐋𝐢𝐟𝐞 & 𝐁𝐥𝐮𝐞𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡 𝟓.𝟑】290mAh battery provides up to 8 days using or 30 days standby. Equips with bluetooth 5.3, compatible with Android 9.0 and iOS 11.0 or above, you can experience faster, wider and low delay connection.

reviews.title: Easy set up and can text and phone calls
reviews.text: I like the looks and it tells me to get off my ass and move.

reviews.title: Decently priced
reviews.text: Chose this watch because of the simplicity and overall look.  The step counts and sleep features work very well.  Battery life is approximately 2 days use when using the push button feature.  If you enable the sensor to come on with your wrist approximately 1 day use.  Charge works very well and quickly.  The downfall is definitely the rubber banding.  The piece that holds the excess band tends to move.  Call feature is ok for the price and messaging is ok.  I primarily needed for an alarm, clock and date.

reviews.title: great smartwatch
reviews.text: I bought this for my uncle for his birthday. He wanted a smart watch to monitor his health. He liked it and it was easy for him to set up.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I had an Apple Watch before this. This is really no different than the Apple Watch,  everything that worked on there works fine here! Did find a screen protector  it is (Smaat 1.7”) it fits perfect! And touch screen still works fine. as far as I can tell there are no other bands made for this type of connection, which is kind of ridiculous. So if the band breaks, you literally have to buy a new watch don’t like that! Also, wish it could at least have the temperature on the screen! And there are only certain screens that have the power level or day and date, and you cannot pick a screen from your photos, etc. and add the date. Just trying to inform people of all of the things that I was looking for in reviews and no one ever mentioned any of these hopefully it helps!

reviews.title: Nice watch!
reviews.text: I bought this watch to track my fitness mainly.  I'm not the type of person who's into gadgets per se but I think this is a winner.  It's not expensive but still stylish and functional.

reviews.title: Good Enough
reviews.text: These are a perfect fit for my samsung fit2 watch & it's great to be able to swap out the color bands to match my clothes.  They're definitely not the same quality as the original band that came w/my watch but they work just fine.  The long charging cord is perfect!!!  No idea why they come with a stupid 4 inch charging cord so your watch has to hang from the wall by the cord - dumbest idea ever by the manufacturer.

title: HOK Smart Watch Bluetooth Call & Text Receive/Dial Smartwatch for Android & iOS Phone with 1.69" Touch Screen Fitness Activity Tracker Women Men
features: 【Unique Smart Watch just for you】- HOK multifunctional smart fitness watch, 1.69’ large HD screen and full-screen sensitive touch, combined with fashionable and elegant appearance design, Light and Durable, suitable for daily business sports and other occasions; You can also customize the dial by transferring your favorite pictures through the ‘DaFit’ APP, match your mood and Make your life more interesting.

【Daily Health Monitor】- The women men smartwatch can monitor your heart rate, blood oxygen, blood pressure and sleep quality status in real-time, help you to live a healthy life better; Contains eight exercise modes, calculate your steps, calories and other important data effectively, become a sports expert of scientific fitness and develop a healthier lifestyle.（The smart watch monitoring data is for reference only and cannot be used for medical purposes.）

【Your Smart Secretary】- After connecting to the phone, you can get call & sms reminders and social media applications push messages, such as Facebook, WhatsApp, Twitter, Instagram, etc. You will not miss any important information; the smart watch also features with many tools, such as music controller, weather, camera control, sedentary reminder, stopwatch, giving you the best regards and protection.

【Waterproof & Long-Life Battery】- The waterproof rating of the smartwatch is IP67, it can resist rainwater impact when you are in outdoor（not recommended to soak in water or steam）. It can be used for 7-10 days after charging for 2 hours.

【Compatibility & Satisfied Service】- HOK smart watch compatible with iOS 8.0+ & Android 5.0+ above smartphones ( APP ‘DaFit’ can be adapted ). Package includes: HOK Smartwatch *1 , little Magnetic Charger *1, User manual *1. If you have any questions about this product, you can contact us anytime. We will reply your messages within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: This watch has a lot of features. I am honestly still finding new ones after a few weeks. Hard to believe all of features at this price point. Had a conversation with someone who couldn't tell it was thru the watch instead of the phone... Very clear. I do wish it came with a manual or website too show you all the features but great watch.
